name: Idol of Rezan, Loa of Kings
Idol of Pa'ku, Master of Winds
Small Mask of Bwonsamdi, Loa of Graves
Grand Mask of Bwonsamdi, Loa of Graves
Open Tome of the Dragon's Dedication
Relaxing Goblin Beach Chair with Cup Gripper
Five Dawns Shrine of the Smoking Fish
Replica Cursed Forge of the Nathrezim
Replica Altar of the Eternal Hunt
Silver Hand Tribute to the Fallen
Stolen Copy of the Blood Ledger
Replica Altar of Light and Shadow
Replica Words of Wind and Earth
Peon's Work Bucket
description: Work is da... you know.

name: Replica Dark Iron Mole Machine
description: Some of the comforts of Shadowforge City can be found wherever else you call home.

name: Warsong Footrest
description: A place to zug zug your feet after a long day of zworbu.

name: Grummle Sleeping Bag
description: Whether up a mountain or at home, a sleeping bag will make you feel safe and warm.

name: Grummle Bedroll
description: A nice bedroll, for rolling in bed.

name: Kafa Press
description: A device for brewing kafa from kafa'kota berries. Take the kafa plunge!

name: Grummle Kafa Refinery
description: Used for the bulk refinement of kafa'kota berries into the transcendent brew known as kafa.

name: Grummle Tent
description: A rustic tent made of yak fur and skins that provides excellent protection from the cold.

name: Kafa Creamer
description: Made from the milk of Kun-Lai yaks, it's lactose free!

name: Legerdemain Lounge Sign Board
description: Great for attracting foot traffic to grand openings or parties.

name: Dalaran Kafa Table
description: A sturdy table ideal for placement near seating areas to hold beverages and kafa table books.

name: Forbidden Fork
description: A fork from the Forbidden Reach. It's not that the fork itself is forbidden. That would be silly.

name: Draconic Metalshaper's Anvil
description: Once used to shape metal purely for war, these anvils are now used by dracthyr artisans to make whatever they want.

name: Replica Grathardormu's Hammer
description: A replica of a legendary hammer once used to swear an oath of vengeance. These replicas are often used by blacksmiths to infuse their craft with a bit of mystique.

name: Green Thumb's Watering Can
description: It's a watering can. Everyone needs a watering can. Even dracthyr.

name: Draconic Auctioneer's Lectern
description: A stylish lectern. Tavern tales tell that standing at once of these makes your speech increase in speed threefold.

name: Obsidian Warder Pennant
description: A banner proudly displaying the symbol of the Obsidian Warder weyrn.

name: Dark Talon Pennant
description: A banner proudly displaying the symbol of the Dark Talon weyrn.

name: Roasted Ram Leg
description: It's a succulent roasted leg of ram. Despite this, it is named after the inn of Valdrakken, and not just because it's a roasted leg of ram.

name: Draconic Trader's Cart
description: A status symbol for some, this stylish cart will let you transport anything smaller than it to wherever you need it to be.

name: Artisan's Measuring Scales
description: Useful for measuring out ingredients or anything else that need weighing. Not recommended for weighing anything larger than a small dog. Or a very large rat.

name: War Creche Teaching Crystal
description: Crystals like these were once used to store Neltharion's teachings for the dracthyr. Not this one, though.

name: Ancient Weyrn Device
description: An ancient device from one of the dracthyr weyrns. It doesn't work anymore other than making a colorful glow.

name: Pandaren Wooden Cart
description: A sturdy cart for the transport of goods. Yaks not included.

name: Commander's Kafa Mug
description: May have "World's Best Commander" engraved on the side.

name: Ceramic Kafa Mug
description: A plain white mug for enjoying various hot beverages like kafa.

name: Dalaran Kafa Grinder
description: Used for grinding dried kafa'kota berries in small batch kafa brewing.

name: Open Sack of Roasted Kafa
description: A sack of roasted kafa'kota berries, opened and ready for brewing.

name: Sealed Sack of Roasted Kafa
description: These kafa'kota berries have been dried, roasted, and sealed for freshness.

name: Dalaran Espresso Machine
description: Brews a concentrated kafa rich with flavor. Espresso yourself!

name: Pylon Fragment
description: This shattered piece was a part of Tortheldrin's extensive pylon system used to contain the powerful demon Immol'thar. There might be somewhere to display this in the Arcantina.

name: Thalassian Chest
description: A typical chest found in Silvermoon.

name: Astalor's Hookah
description: The same type of hookah found in Astalor's Sanctum. Comes with a card that says "With my compliments - A".

name: 590 Quel'Lithien Red Display Bottle
description: Some bottles of wine are for drinking, other bottles of wine are for showing off to people what you could have been drinking if you opened it. This is the latter.

name: Thalassian Academy Dictation Device
description: For when one has just the most incredible thoughts, and simply can't pick up a pen with which to write them down. Or taking notes in university while not paying attention to the lecturer.

name: Sin'dorei Wine Display
description: Some bottles of wine are for drinking, other bottles of wine are for showing off to people what you could have been drinking if you opened it. This is the later but dialed up to the nines.

name: Harvesting Hatchet
description: A magical hatchet from your home neighborhood. Used to harvest lumber, which you can later use to craft decor with crafting professions.

name: Artisanal Display Tent
description: A tent that functions as a decorative element to anything placed in it. It also functions as a tent, if you need it for that.

name: Eversong Crystal Glass
description: When one must drink wine, one should do so with only the finest eversong crystal.

name: 590 Quel'Lithien Red
description: Some bottles of wine are for drinking, other bottles of wine are for showing off to people what you could have been drinking if you opened it. This is the former.

name: "Silvermoon in Summer" Painting
description: A framed painting by the artists of Silvermoon.

name: "The Last Day of the Semester" Painting
description: A framed painting by the artists of Silvermoon.

name: "A Bridge Over Calm Waters" Painting
description: A framed painting by the artists of Silvermoon.
